headline: Is a Beat in the Cards for Brown & Brown This Earnings Season?
summary: BRO's Q1 2026 results are likely to reflect acquisitions, new business, higher commissions and improved investment income.

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
